description: Site registry for critical notice ingestion. Clients register a site by providing only the rootUrl, dropdownLabel, and parserModel. Business units are discovered automatically by the scanner Logic App at runtime.

parserModels.description: Reference list of supported parserModel values. Each value implies both a notice-list parsing strategy AND a business-unit discovery strategy in the scanner workflow. Adding a new value requires (1) a new Switch case in scanner-multisite.json AND (2) a new branch in the inline JavaScript extractor.

supported.description: Notice list endpoint returns HTML; notices live in <tr> rows; noticeId extracted from a query-string token (e.g., strKey1).
supported.discovery: On the rootUrl, find the <ul> following the anchor whose text contains dropdownLabel. For each <li><a href> extract code from query-string token 'Pipe='. Display name is the anchor text (parens portion is a display alias and is stripped).

supported.description: Notice list endpoint returns a JSON object with a `rows` array; each row has `id` and a `cell` array (cell[0]=noticeId, cell[1]=title, cell[2]=postedDate).
supported.discovery: On the rootUrl, find the <ul> following the anchor whose text contains dropdownLabel. For each <li><a onclick="changeAsset('NNN', 'Name (CODE)')">, extract assetId from group 1 and code from the parens portion of the label.

canonical.description: Canonical schema for unified notice storage (Fabric-ready)

fields.name: blobPath
fields.description: Path to raw content in storage
